pageDescription: Calculate percentages, ratios, and percentage changes easily with our comprehensive percentage calculator

calculationTypes.partToWhole: What is {part} of {whole} as a percentage?
calculationTypes.percentageChange: What is the percentage change from {value1} to {value2}?
calculationTypes.percentageDifference: What is the percentage difference between {value1} and {value2}?

percentageChange.title: Percentage Change
percentageChange.formula: Change = ((New Value - Original Value) ÷ Original Value) × 100

criticalWarningsList.notDiagnostic: This calculator provides mathematical calculations only
criticalWarningsList.accuracy: Ensure you're using the correct calculation type for your needs

importantNotesList: Percentages are used in many real-world applications including finance, statistics, and science
Always double-check your inputs to ensure accurate results
Consider the context of your calculation to choose the appropriate percentage formula
Negative percentage changes indicate a decrease, while positive changes indicate an increase

messages.enterInformation: Enter your values to calculate the percentage
messages.resultMessage: The result of your calculation is shown below

disclaimer.title: Important Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: This calculator provides mathematical calculations based on standard percentage formulas. The accuracy of results depends on the correctness of the input values and selection of the appropriate calculation type.

seekHelp.title: Additional Resources
seekHelp.content: For complex percentage calculations or specialized applications, consider consulting a mathematics professional or using specialized software tools designed for your specific field of work.
